lore.english:
Taimanin, member of a special UFS institute. Born to a Taimanin who became a UFS  member, and a UFS agent. Lost her parents to demons and was taken away to a UFS anti-demon research facility. To avenge her parents' deaths, she research-ed with the UFS in the lab to defeat demons instead of training her combat skills. Later she goes against demon forces after joining a special UFS institute. 
 
She talks in a noble, samurai-like tone since she likes watching historical tv series. She's very easy-going and cheerful, but timid when it comes to dealing with relationship issues. Uses a Japanese sword and a pistol as her weapons.
 
A Water Artist, with the power to use her ninja art "Bubbles". She makes bubbles out of the moisture in the air, forcing enemies to slip on them or enhancing weapons by covering them with her bubbles.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Waterfowl Dance[-]
skills.description: Attacks the enemy 3 times using a sword and a gun.
skills.description_readable: Attacks the enemy 3 times using a sword and a gun.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Samurai Shooter[-]
skills.description: On [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnStart], if the character's [&HP] is [&Color_Cyan]90%[-] or more, fills the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of an ally with the highest [&ATK] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:700201]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:700201]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable: On [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnStart], if the character's [&HP] is 90% or more, fills the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of an ally with the highest [&ATK] by ([V3:700201]%) at a [R:700201]% chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Water Art: Bubble[-]
skills.description:
By using Water Art, grants [&Color_Cyan]([V3:700301]%)[-] [&SpdUp] to [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:700301] turn(s)
If the target is a [&Destruction] type, additionally grants [&Shield] equal to [&Color_Cyan][V3:700302]%[-] of the target's Max. [&HP].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:700302] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
By using Water Art, grants ([V3:700301]%) [&SpdUp] to [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll].

If the target is a [&Destruction] type, additionally grants [&Shield] equal to [V3:700302]% of the target's Max. [&HP].
